title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO IBABANG BANOT, MUNICIPALITY OF GUMACA, PROVINCE OF QUEZON, TO GITNANG BARRIO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1525 / 55 OG No. 38, 8104 (September 21, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2547, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO IBABANG BANOT, MUNICIPALITY OF GUMACA, PROVINCE OF QUEZON, TO GITNANG BARRIO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Barrio Ibabang Banot, Municipality of Gumaca, Province of Quezon, is hereby changed to Gitnang Barrio.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
